rationale: P0 coverage is 4% (required: 100%). 44 critical requirements uncovered. This is an automation-gap FAIL — the test design catalog is comprehensive and high-confidence; the gap is that downstream automation (atdd → automate) has only delivered Wave 1a (4 of 47 P0 scenarios). Distinct from a correctness FAIL (which would imply existing tests are red on intended behavior).
